PrefetchTgt RN-F,
RN-D, RN-I SN-F

a
The request is permitted, but not expected, from RN-D or RN-I.
b
PrefetchTgt transactions are not expected, but are permitted, from devices in RME-based systems. It is recommended that a host drops a PrefetchTgt
from the device and does not propagate it to the Subordinate.
